T0188.title: Four-Factor PII
T0188.definition: In illicit data trading, refers to the four critical pieces of financial information: cardholder name, national ID number, bank card number, and the phone number registered with the bank.
T0188.description: In illicit data trading, refers to the four critical pieces of financial information: cardholder name, national ID number, bank card number, and the phone number registered with the bank.
T0188.usageExample: "Bank four-element data, rumored insider material, act fast or regret missing out"
